title: MC Horizon
description: Dive into a world full of beautiful terrain and more...
body:
**Welcome to MC Horizon, the new survival-based modpack. With mods that enchance the overall world gensuch as:**

-Blooming Biosphere

-Hearths

-YUNG's better Structures and Biomes
  
-and more...

**Modpack offers you many QOL (Quality Of Life) mods like:**

-Backpacks

-Diagonal Fences and Windows

-Inventory Management

-and more...

**If you worry about graphics, then YOU ARE WRONG! My modpack adds very beautiful shaders and good looking texture packs, so don't worry about your game looking like potato :D**

**One of the texture packs is Stay True. Here is a link if you wanna read about it : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true**

**Immerse into a world full of beatiful terrain, with MC Horizon.**
